task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Products page in Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo web interface is visible, showing the Products list or kanban view.

task_completion.description: Agent uploads the product_catalog.csv file for import.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo 'Import a File' screen is visible, showing the uploaded filename 'product_catalog.csv'.

task_completion.description: Agent maps the basic identification fields in the import interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Odoo import mapping screen, the CSV column 'Product Name' is mapped to the Odoo field 'Name', 'SKU' is mapped to 'Internal Reference', and 'Category' is mapped to 'Product Category'.

task_completion.description: Agent maps the pricing and specification fields in the import interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Odoo import mapping screen, the CSV column 'Unit Cost' is mapped to 'Cost', 'Retail Price' is mapped to 'Sales Price', 'Type' is mapped to 'Product Type', and 'Weight (kg)' is mapped to 'Weight'.

task_completion.description: Agent executes the import process successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message such as '12 records successfully imported' is displayed in the Odoo interface.

task_completion.description: The imported products are visible in the Odoo system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Products list or kanban view displays the newly imported electronics products (e.g., Anker PowerCore, Logitech M720, ELEC-001, etc.).

integrity.description: The agent performed the task using the Odoo web interface in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Odoo GUI, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo import tool rather than manually creating products.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo import mapping screen is visible in the trajectory, proving the bulk import feature was used.

integrity.description: The final products list is shown within the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The imported products are displayed within the Odoo interface, not just in a spreadsheet, text editor, or terminal output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file is located at '/home/ga/Desktop/product_catalog.csv'. There are exactly 12 products to be imported. The expected category for the products is 'All / Electronics'. Example products include 'Anker PowerCore 10000mAh Portable Charger' (SKU: ELEC-001, Cost: 18.5, Price: 29.99, Weight: 0.18) and 'Logitech M720 Triathlon Multi-Device Mouse' (SKU: ELEC-002, Cost: 32.0, Price: 49.99, Weight: 0.14).
